creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
OK Dan. Further investigation reveals (at least for now)
that your suggestion will prevent the fatal crash -- thanks!

Miroslav, and others; please see pr
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=207628
for an svn diff to patch your current version. Or wait until
that diff gets committed, and svn up your current ports tree.

Thanks!

--Chris
